cards.title: POCUS Overview
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Probe types: Linear (superficial), Curvilinear (abdominal), Phased array (cardiac)
  • FAST exam: Hepatorenal, splenorenal, pelvic, cardiac windows
  • Lung: Sliding sign (rules out PTX), B-lines (pulmonary oedema)
  • IVC collapsibility: >50% = fluid responsive
  • Cardiac: EF estimation, pericardial effusion
